context: Tests whether the agent implements the FX rate ingestion service using the prescribed HTTP client, rate provider, environment configuration, currency list, inverse rate storage, idempotency pattern, and fallback strategy.

checklist.name: axios HTTP client
checklist.description: Uses axios (not fetch, got, node-fetch, or other HTTP clients) for making requests to the rate API

checklist.name: API key from env var
checklist.description: Reads the API key from process.env.OPEN_EXCHANGE_RATES_APP_ID (not hardcoded)

checklist.name: FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY env var
checklist.description: Reads the base/functional currency from process.env.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY

checklist.name: USD default
checklist.description: Defaults FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY to 'USD' when the environment variable is not set (uses ?? or || 'USD')

checklist.name: All 10 tracked currencies
checklist.description: The tracked currency list includes all of: EUR, GBP, CAD, AUD, JPY, CHF, SEK, NOK, DKK, NZD

checklist.name: Inverse rates stored
checklist.description: Stores inverse rates (quote→base direction, rate = 1 / direct_rate) alongside the direct rates in the same bulk insert

checklist.name: skipDuplicates on insert
checklist.description: Bulk insert uses skipDuplicates: true (or equivalent ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING) to make the job idempotent

checklist.name: 7-day fallback window
checklist.description: getRate falls back to the most recent rate within 7 days before the requested date when an exact match is not found

checklist.name: Same-currency short-circuit
checklist.description: getRate returns 1 immediately when fromCurrency equals toCurrency (no database lookup needed)
